message:
fix(lifecycle,ratelimit): clippy lint fixes and overflow-safe token bucket refill arithmetic

- lifecycle_tests: add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to multi_rollback_retry_cycle,
  fix doc comment formatting with backticks, use == instead of if-let for error comparison
- token_bucket: replace u32 intermediate multiplication (which could overflow when periods
  is large and refill_amount > 1) with u128 arithmetic that saturates before truncating
  to u32. Also fix last_refill advancement to avoid u64 overflow by computing advancement
  in u128 nanos first and falling back to `now` on overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
